form.formComment: Third-up today. Not raced for 37 days. First-up 4th of 8 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Stormwatch with 55.5kg at $1.90. Last start 3rd of 8 at this track in the G1 Cape Derby on February 28 over 2000m, 3 len behind Wish List with 60kg at $17. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard in the early and middle stages.
Shortly after the start, bumped heavily and lost ground.

form.formComment: On a three run winning streak. Returns from a 37-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by 1.0 len at this track LR February 28 over 2500m defeating Landoftherisingsun with 60kg at $2.80. The run before that favourite; won by 0.8 len at Durbanville February 11 over 2000m defeating La Pulga carrying 61.5kg at $6.50. Racing well and can win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped inwards.
Leaving the stalls, made contact with Pinot Grigio.
Made contact with Goodnessgraciousme leaving the stalls.
Buffeted between The Grey King and Captain West shortly after the start.
Jumped slow, losing one length.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of nine weeks. Finished off last campaign second of 11 at this track in the G1 The Met January 31 over 2000m, 0.8 len behind See It Again carrying 59.5kg at $34. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.5 len this track G3 November 8 over 1600m defeating Kamchatka with 57kg at $26. Looks a key runner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 200m, rolled out and bumped the hindquarters of The Real Prince.
Shortly after the start, bumped on both sides by Ardabil and Gallic Dream.
At the 200m, shifted out away from the crop and had to be straightened.
Hanging out in the latter stages.
Hung in from the 300m.
From a wide draw raced wide and without cover in the early stages.
Over-raced in the early stages.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 37-day let-up. At the latest run favourite; won by a neck at this track LR February 28 over 1600m defeating I Salute You carrying 60kg at $4.50. The start before that favourite; won by 0.5 len at Durbanville February 14 over 1400m on a soft track defeating Captain West carrying 61.5kg at $2.80. Winning chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, taken in behind runners from its outside draw.

Hanging out on the turn.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 37-day let-up. First-up after three months 7th of 9 at this track in LR on February 28 over 1600m, 3 len behind Jet Force carrying 60kg at $51. Previously second-up 16th of 20 at Turffontein Standside in the G1 Summer Cup on November 29 over 2000m, 34 len behind Mocha Blend with 54.5kg at $15. Needs to do a lot more.
